refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify that availability metric meets or exceeds the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid detection and recovery from faults affecting availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and diagnostics system.
DP2: Design modular vehicle components for quick replacement and repair.
DP3: Provide remote teleoperation fallback to maintain operation during local failures.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and diagnostics system.

potential_sources: Interaction between fault detection and vehicle hardware components
Dependency on teleoperation system for fallback
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses FR2 with minimal coupling; interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules are well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Assumes fault detection algorithms can be integrated without excessive latency.
Risk that diagnostics may not cover all failure modes, impacting availability.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding DP3 to cover fallback operation if diagnostics alone are insufficient.

im_boundary.name: Safety Services
im_boundary.scope: Fault detection and diagnostics system implementation, including safety-critical monitoring and alerting.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data from Vehicle and sends diagnostic status updates.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts to Safety Services and operators upon fault detection.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates diagnostic data and status with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion due to broad system scope; containment low for fault detection specifics.
Vehicle hardware contains sensors but fault detection logic is external.
Best containment for fault detection and diagnostics; aligns with safety criticality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Safety Services module is the optimal boundary for implementing fault detection and diagnostics due to safety criticality and focused scope.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Risk of delayed fault propagation if interfaces are not well synchronized.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure interface definitions are detailed and tested to mitigate integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion of fault detection data across multiple modules may complicate integration.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Safety Services module provides strong containment for the DP, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and safety alert logs within Safety Services.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of fault detection DP to Safety Services IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface protocols between Safety Services and Vehicle to reduce latency.
Consider fallback DP and IM for teleoperation integration in next decomposition level.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, adding fallback operation DP and corresponding IM assignment will improve coverage of availability requirements.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid detection and recovery from faults affecting availability.

revise.why: To incorporate fallback teleoperation DP to enhance availability beyond fault detection.

assumptions: Fault detection can be centralized in Safety Services.
Telemetry and SafetyAlert interfaces are reliable and timely.
open_risks: Interface latency impacting fault response time.
evidence_needed: Performance data on fault detection latency and accuracy.
